    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What are the unique features of the Google Pixel 7?
        The Google Pixel 7 offers distinctive features such as the Google Tensor G2 processor for enhanced AI capabilities, a 50MP rear camera with advanced photo and video algorithms, and Real Tone technology that accurately represents different skin tones. It also supports Face Unblur and Magic Eraser in Google Photos, enhancing image quality and user experience.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • How does the Pixel 7's camera compare to other smartphones?
        The Pixel 7's camera stands out with its computational photography capabilities, including Night Sight for low-light conditions and Super Res Zoom for high-quality zoomed images. Its Cinematic Blur feature for video also sets it apart, offering depth effects similar to professional cameras.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • What are the battery life and charging capabilities?
        The Google Pixel 7 is equipped with a battery that supports all-day usage and has fast charging capabilities. It also supports wireless charging and battery share, allowing it to charge other devices wirelessly. This makes it convenient for users who need power throughout the day and for those who use multiple gadgets.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
